title: PreEarningsProfile v1
description: Domain-specific pre-earnings research module for US equity options: BMO/AMC session semantics, DPE targeting, earnings-specific gap-exposure rules, and IV crush policy for options event-risk experiments. Does not include pre-earnings-specific, statistical-assessment, or computed-output fields.

preearnings_profile_id.description: Canonical pre-earnings profile identifier. Format: PEP-YYYY-NNNN.

preearnings_profile_version.description: Monotonically increasing version. Start at 1. Increment on any field change after initial commit.

event_study_spec_ref.description: Reference to an EventStudySpec providing event-alignment structure. Format: EVS-YYYY-NNNN.

options_event_risk_ref.description: Reference to an OptionsEventRiskSpec providing options configuration. Format: OER-YYYY-NNNN.

session_anchor_policy.description: Which session(s) the earnings announcement applies to.

earnings_time_reference.description: Source and reliability of the earnings announcement time.

entry_dpe_policy.description: DPE targeting policy for entry: target DPE range, anchor day count conventions.

entry_dpe_min.description: Minimum DPE for entry (inclusive), e.g., 1 = 1 day before earnings.

entry_dpe_max.description: Maximum DPE for entry (inclusive), e.g., 5 = 5 days before earnings.

dpe_counting_convention.description: Calendar days vs. trading days vs. session days.

anchor_day_policy.description: How the earnings date anchors the DPE count.

entry_window_start.description: When the entry window opens relative to DPE.

entry_window_end.description: When the entry window closes relative to DPE.

dpe_tolerance.description: Tolerance in DPE units for dynamic adjustment.

exit_dpe_policy.description: DPE targeting policy for exit and IV crush measurement.

exit_dpe_min.description: Minimum DPE for exit (inclusive), e.g., 0 = on earnings date.

exit_dpe_max.description: Maximum DPE for exit (inclusive), e.g., 30 = 30 days after earnings.

dpe_counting_convention.description: Calendar days vs. trading days vs. session days.

anchor_day_policy.description: How the earnings date anchors the DPE count.

iv_collapse_threshold.description: IV crush threshold for early exit (e.g., 0.50 = exit when IV collapses 50%).

iv_crush_policy.description: IV crush characterization: measurement window, crush magnitude estimate, IV hierarchy policy.

iv_crush_measurement_window.description: Window for measuring IV crush: start (DPE), end (DPE), unit (dpe/sessions/calendar_days).

start.description: DPE at which the measurement window starts.

end.description: DPE at which the measurement window ends.

iv_crush_magnitude_estimate.description: Estimated crush magnitude for planning (e.g., 0.35 = 35% IV drop).

iv_hierarchy_policy.description: Which IV source to use: primary (IV raw, IV rank, IV percentile), fallback sources.

crush_confirm_window.description: Window for confirming crush occurred: start, end, unit.

iv_surface_ref.description: Reference to volatility surface artifact for IV/IV percentile lookups.

gap_exposure_policy.description: Whether strategy may hold across earnings announcement.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of pre-earnings profile declaration.

name.description: Reviewer name. Must be a non-empty string.

instrument_universe_ref.description: Reference to an InstrumentUniverseSpec for eligible underlying instruments. Format: IUS-YYYY-NNNN.

outcome_spec_refs.description: References to OutcomeSpecs measuring outcomes in this pre-earnings experiment. Format: OUT-YYYY-NNNN.

earnings_calendar_ref.description: Reference to an earnings calendar artifact for confirmed earnings dates.

iv_surface_ref.description: Reference to a volatility surface artifact for IV/IV percentile lookups.

dpe_calendar_policy.description: DPE calendar conventions: weekend handling, holiday handling, exchange calendar reference.

exchange_calendar_ref.description: Reference to an exchange calendar artifact.

session_overlap_policy.description: How to handle stocks with both BMO and AMC earnings on the same day.

earnings_revision_policy.description: How to handle earnings date revisions or rescheduled announcements.

minimum_iv_rank.description: Minimum IV rank required for inclusion (0.0 to 1.0).

gap_historical_policy.description: Historical gap analysis: gap percentile threshold, gap direction filter.

earnings_size_filter.description: Filter by earnings size or surprise history: EPS surprise threshold, revenue behavior.

hypothesis_id.description: Reference to EdgeHypothesisRegistry hypothesis being tested. Format: HYP-YYYY-NNNN.

runner_output_refs.description: References to runner outputs produced under this pre-earnings profile.

review_packet_refs.description: References to ReviewPackets that evaluated hypotheses using this profile.

extension_hooks.description: Optional extension object for future domain-specific fields.

domain_profile_extension_refs.description: Extension references to domain profile artifacts.

runner_output_extension_refs.description: Extension references to runner output artifacts.

review_packet_extension_refs.description: Extension references to review packet artifacts.

options_event_risk_extension_refs.description: Extension references to options event-risk artifacts.

event_study_extension_refs.description: Extension references to event study artifacts.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the pre-earnings design rationale.
